meta.title: Slay the Spire 2 Guides, Cards, Relics and Tools
meta.description: A bilingual Slay the Spire 2 guide site with cards, relics, builds and practical tools.

home.title: Slay the Spire 2 guides, card database and build tools
home.description: Structured references for characters, cards, relics, events, archetypes and ascension planning.
home.cardsDescription: Check cards, relics, builds and tools while you play, keeping reward picks, route risk and boss prep in one decision flow.
planningItems: Look up characters, cards, relics, events and ascension routes to identify what your current run is missing.
Use card filters, relic notes and build routes to judge whether a reward supports your actual plan.
Class filters, language switching and card details are built for quick second-screen checks during a run.
Use route risk, card removal value and boss kill windows to make fewer guesses on key turns.
